channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 25.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: ‘Those girls deserve justice’: Minister’s emotional plea after boys spared jail for raping teenagers
item.description: ‘Those girls deserve justice’: Minister’s emotional plea after boys spared jail for raping teenagers

item.title: Novara Media: UK Government Held Secret Meetings With Peter Mandelson’s Lobby Firm

item.title: FT UK Politics: Andy Burnham’s social media posts: the political everyman?
item.description: Andy Burnham’s social media posts: the political everyman?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Keir Starmer defiant as Labour leadership challenge mounts from rivals: ‘Our plan is working’

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer asks TNT Sports to make Champions League final free to view

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Inside the Brexit-voting Labour stronghold that looks set to determine our next prime minister

item.title: Independent UK Politics: France bans Israeli minister Itamar Ben-Gvir after 'unspeakable' flotilla detainee taunts
